 122→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.parents
 123→import java.util.Deque
 124→import java.util.LinkedList
 125→
 126→private val LOGGER = KotlinLogging.logger {}.initKtLintKLogger()
 127→
 128→public class IndentationRule :
 129→    StandardRule(
 130→        id = "indent",
 131→        visitorModifiers =
 132→            setOf(
 133→                VisitorModifier.RunAsLateAsPossible,
 134→                VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 135→                    ruleId = FUNCTION_SIGNATURE_RULE_ID,
 136→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 137→                ),
 138→                VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 139→                    ruleId = TRAILING_COMMA_ON_CALL_SITE_RULE_ID,
 140→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 141→                ),
 142→                VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 143→                    ruleId = TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_RULE_ID,
 144→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 145→                ),
 146→            ),
 147→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 148→            setOf(
 149→                CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 150→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 151→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 152→            ),
 153→    ) {
 154→    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 155→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 156→
 157→    private var line = 1
 158→
 159→    private val indentContextStack: Deque<IndentContext> = LinkedList()
 160→
 161→    private lateinit var stringTemplateIndenter: StringTemplateIndenter
 162→
 163→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 164→        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
 165→        indentConfig =
 166→            IndentConfig(
 167→                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 168→                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 169→            )
 170→        if (indentConfig.disabled) {
 171→            stopTraversalOfAST()
 172→        }
 173→    }
 174→
 175→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 176→        node: ASTNode,
 177→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 178→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 179→    ) {
 180→        if (node.isRoot()) {
 181→            // File should not start with a whitespace
 182→            node
 183→                .nextLeaf()
 184→                ?.takeIf { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
 185→                ?.let { whitespaceWithoutNewline ->
 186→                    emit(node.startOffset, "Unexpected indentation", true)
 187→                    if (autoCorrect) {
 188→                        whitespaceWithoutNewline.treeParent.removeChild(whitespaceWithoutNewline)
 189→                    }
 190→                }
 191→            indentContextStack.addLast(startNoIndentZone(node))
 192→        }
 193→
 194→        when {
 195→            node.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() -> {
 196→                line++
 197→                if (indentContextStack.peekLast()?.activated == false) {
 198→                    val lastIndentContext = indentContextStack.removeLast()
 199→                    indentContextStack.addLast(
 200→                        lastIndentContext.copy(activated = true),
 201→                    )
 202→                }
 203→                visitNewLineIndentation(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 204→            }
 205→
 206→            node.elementType == CLASS_BODY ||
 207→                node.elementType == CONTEXT_RECEIVER_LIST ||
 208→                node.elementType == LONG_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY ||
 209→                node.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_CALL_ENTRY ||
 210→                node.elementType == STRING_TEMPLATE ||
 211→                node.elementType == VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST ->
 212→                startIndentContext(
 213→                    fromAstNode = node,
 214→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 215→                )
 216→
 217→            node.elementType == VALUE_ARGUMENT ->
 218→                visitValueArgument(node)
 219→
 220→            node.elementType == SECONDARY_CONSTRUCTOR ->
 221→                visitSecondaryConstructor(node)
 222→
 223→            node.elementType == PARENTHESIZED &&
 224→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != IF ->
 225→                startIndentContext(node)
 226→
 227→            node.elementType == BINARY_WITH_TYPE ||
 228→                node.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_ENTRY ||
 229→                node.elementType == TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST ||
 230→                node.elementType == TYPE_PARAMETER_LIST ||
 231→                node.elementType == USER_TYPE ->
 232→                startIndentContext(node)
 233→
 234→            node.elementType == DELEGATED_SUPER_TYPE_ENTRY ||
 235→                node.elementType == ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION ||
 236→                node.elementType == TYPE_REFERENCE ->
 237→                startIndentContext(
 238→                    fromAstNode = node,
 239→                    childIndent = "",
 240→                )
 241→
 242→            node.elementType == IF ->
 243→                visitIf(node)
 244→
 245→            node.elementType == LBRACE ->
 246→                visitLbrace(node)
 247→
 248→            node.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST &&
 249→                node.treeParent.elementType != FUNCTION_LITERAL ->
 250→                startIndentContext(
 251→                    fromAstNode = node,
 252→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 253→                )
 254→
 255→            node.elementType == LPAR &&
 256→                node.nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == CONDITION ->
 257→                visitLparBeforeCondition(node)
 258→
 259→            node.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER ->
 260→                visitValueParameter(node)
 261→
 262→            node.elementType == FUN ->
 263→                visitFun(node)
 264→
 265→            node.elementType == CLASS ->
 266→                visitClass(node)
 267→
 268→            node.elementType == OBJECT_DECLARATION ->
 269→                visitObjectDeclaration(node)
 270→
 271→            node.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION ->
 272→                visitBinaryExpression(node)
 273→
 274→            node.elementType in CHAINABLE_EXPRESSION -> {
 275→                if (codeStyle == ktlint_official &&
 276→                    node.elementType == DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION &&
 277→                    node.treeParent?.elementType == ARRAY_ACCESS_EXPRESSION &&
 278→                    node.treeParent?.treeParent?.elementType == CALL_EXPRESSION
 279→                ) {
 280→                    // Issue 1540: Deviate and fix from incorrect formatting in IntelliJ IDEA formatting and produce following:
 281→                    // val fooBar2 = foo
 282→                    //    .bar[0] {
 283→                    //        "foobar"
 284→                    //    }
 285→                    startIndentContext(
 286→                        fromAstNode = node.treeParent,
 287→                        toAstNode = node.treeParent.treeParent.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 288→                    )
 289→                } else if (node.prevCodeSibling().isElvisOperator()) {
 290→                    startIndentContext(node)
 291→                } else if (node.treeParent.elementType in CHAINABLE_EXPRESSION) {
 292→                    // Multiple dot qualified expressions and/or safe expression on the same line should not increase the indent level
 293→                } else {
 294→                    startIndentContext(node)
 295→                }
 296→            }
 297→
 298→            node.elementType == IDENTIFIER &&
 299→                node.treeParent.elementType == PROPERTY ->
 300→                visitIdentifierInProperty(node)
 301→
 302→            node.elementType == LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY &&
 303→                node.nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == CLOSING_QUOTE ->
 304→                visitWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingQuote(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 305→
 306→            node.elementType == WHEN ->
 307→                visitWhen(node)
 308→
 309→            node.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY ->
 310→                visitWhenEntry(node)
 311→
 312→            node.elementType == WHERE_KEYWORD &&
 313→                node.nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == TYPE_CONSTRAINT_LIST ->
 314→                visitWhereKeywordBeforeTypeConstraintList(node)
 315→
 316→            node.elementType == KDOC ->
 317→                visitKdoc(node)
 318→
 319→            node.elementType == PROPERTY_ACCESSOR ||
 320→                node.elementType == TYPEALIAS ->
 321→                visitPropertyAccessor(node)
 322→
 323→            node.elementType == FOR ||
 324→                node.elementType == WHILE ->
 325→                visitConditionalLoop(node)
 326→
 327→            node.elementType == LBRACKET ->
 328→                visitLBracket(node)
 329→
 330→            node.elementType == NULLABLE_TYPE ->
 331→                visitNullableType(node)
 332→
 333→            node.elementType == DESTRUCTURING_DECLARATION ->
 334→                visitDestructuringDeclaration(node)
 335→
 336→            node.elementType == TRY ->
 337→                visitTryCatchFinally(node)
 338→
 339→            else -> {
 340→                LOGGER.trace { "No processing for ${node.elementType}: ${node.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()}" }
 341→            }
 342→        }
 343→    }
 344→
 345→    private fun visitValueArgument(node: ASTNode) {
 346→        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official) {
 347→            // Deviate from standard IntelliJ IDEA formatting to allow formatting below:
 348→            //     val foo = foo(
 349→            //         parameterName =
 350→            //             "The quick brown fox "
 351→            //                .plus("jumps ")
 352→            //                .plus("over the lazy dog"),
 353→            //     )
 354→            startIndentContext(
 355→                fromAstNode = node,
 356→                lastChildIndent = "",
 357→            )
 358→        }
 359→    }
 360→
 361→    private fun visitSecondaryConstructor(node: ASTNode) {
 362→        node
 363→            .findChildByType(CONSTRUCTOR_DELEGATION_CALL)
 364→            ?.let { constructorDelegationCall ->
 365→                val fromAstNode = node.skipLeadingWhitespaceCommentsAndAnnotations()
 366→                val nextToAstNode =
 367→                    startIndentContext(
 368→                        fromAstNode = constructorDelegationCall,
 369→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 370→
 371→                // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as constructor itself
 372→                if (fromAstNode != node.nextLeaf()) {
 373→                    startIndentContext(
 374→                        fromAstNode = node,
 375→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 376→                        childIndent = "",
 377→                    )
 378→                }
 379→            }
 380→    }
 381→
 382→    private fun visitIf(node: ASTNode) {
 383→        var nextToAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 384→        node
 385→            .findChildByType(ELSE)
 386→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 387→                nextToAstNode =
 388→                    startIndentContext(
 389→                        fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 390→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 391→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 392→            }
 393→
 394→        node
 395→            .findChildByType(THEN)
 396→            ?.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 397→            ?.nextLeaf()
 398→            ?.let { nodeAfterThenBlock ->
 399→                nextToAstNode =
 400→                    startIndentContext(
 401→                        fromAstNode = nodeAfterThenBlock,
 402→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 403→                        childIndent = "",
 404→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 405→            }
 406→        node
 407→            .findChildByType(RPAR)
 408→            ?.nextCodeLeaf()
 409→            ?.let { nodeAfterConditionBlock ->
 410→                nextToAstNode =
 411→                    startIndentContext(
 412→                        fromAstNode = nodeAfterConditionBlock,
 413→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 414→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 415→            }
 416→        startIndentContext(
 417→            fromAstNode = node,
 418→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 419→            lastChildIndent = "", // No indent for the RPAR
 420→        )
 421→    }
 422→
 423→    private fun visitLbrace(node: ASTNode) {
 424→        // Outer indent context
 425→        val rbrace =
 426→            requireNotNull(
 427→                node.nextSibling { it.elementType == RBRACE },
 428→            ) { "Can not find matching rbrace" }
 429→        startIndentContext(
 430→            fromAstNode = node,
 431→            toAstNode = rbrace,
 432→            firstChildIndent = "",
 433→            lastChildIndent = "",
 434→        )
 435→
 436→        // Inner indent context in reversed order
 437→        node
 438→            .treeParent
 439→            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == FUNCTION_LITERAL }
 440→            ?.findChildByType(ARROW)
 441→            ?.let { arrow ->
 442→                startIndentContext(
 443→                    fromAstNode = arrow,
 444→                    toAstNode = rbrace,
 445→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 446→                )
 447→                startIndentContext(
 448→                    fromAstNode = node,
 449→                    toAstNode = arrow.prevCodeLeaf()!!,
 450→                    childIndent = arrow.calculateIndentOfFunctionLiteralParameters(),
 451→                )
 452→            }
 453→    }
 454→
 455→    private fun ASTNode.calculateIndentOfFunctionLiteralParameters() =
 456→        if (isFirstParameterOfFunctionLiteralPrecededByNewLine()) {
 457→            // val fieldExample =
 458→            //      LongNameClass {
 459→            //              paramA,
 460→            //              paramB,
 461→            //              paramC ->
 462→            //          ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
 463→            //      }
 464→            indentConfig.indent.repeat(2)
 465→        } else {
 466→            // Allow default IntelliJ IDEA formatting:
 467→            // val fieldExample =
 468→            //     LongNameClass { paramA,
 469→            //                     paramB,
 470→            //                     paramC ->
 471→            //         ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
 472→            //     }
 473→            // val fieldExample =
 474→            //     someFunction(
 475→            //         1,
 476→            //         2,
 477→            //     ) { paramA,
 478→            //         paramB,
 479→            //         paramC ->
 480→            //         ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
 481→            //     }
 482→            this
 483→                .takeIf { it.isPartOf(CALL_EXPRESSION) }
 484→                ?.treeParent
 485→                ?.leaves(false)
 486→                ?.takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
 487→                ?.sumOf { it.textLength }
 488→                ?.plus(2) // need to add spaces to compensate for "{ "
 489→                ?.let { length -> " ".repeat(length) }
 490→                ?: indentConfig.indent.repeat(2)
 491→        }
 492→
 493→    private fun ASTNode.isFirstParameterOfFunctionLiteralPrecededByNewLine() =
 494→        parent(FUNCTION_LITERAL)
 495→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST)
 496→            ?.prevSibling { it.textContains('\n') } != null
 497→
 498→    private fun visitLparBeforeCondition(node: ASTNode) {
 499→        startIndentContext(
 500→            fromAstNode = requireNotNull(node.nextLeaf()), // Allow to pickup whitespace before condition
 501→            toAstNode = requireNotNull(node.nextCodeSibling()).lastChildLeafOrSelf(), // Ignore whitespace after condition but before rpar
 502→            nodeIndent = currentIndent() + indentConfig.indent,
 503→            childIndent = "",
 504→        )
 505→    }
 506→
 507→    private fun visitValueParameter(node: ASTNode) {
 508→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 509→        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 510→        node
 511→            .findChildByType(EQ)
 512→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 513→                nextToAstNode =
 514→                    startIndentContext(
 515→                        fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 516→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 517→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 518→            }
 519→
 520→        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official) {
 521→            // Deviate from standard IntelliJ IDEA formatting to allow formatting below:
 522→            //     fun process(
 523→            //         aVariableWithAVeryLongName:
 524→            //             TypeWithAVeryLongNameThatDoesNotFitOnSameLineAsTheVariableName
 525→            //     ): List<Output>
 526→            node
 527→                .findChildByType(COLON)
 528→                ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 529→                    nextToAstNode =
 530→                        startIndentContext(
 531→                            fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 532→                            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 533→                        ).prevCodeLeaf()
 534→                }
 535→        }
 536→
 537→        // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as constructor itself
 538→        val fromAstNode = node.skipLeadingWhitespaceCommentsAndAnnotations()
 539→        if (fromAstNode != node.firstChildNode &&
 540→            node.prevSibling { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() } == null &&
 541→            node == node.treeParent.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER)
 542→        ) {
 543→            nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 544→                fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 545→                toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 546→            ).fromASTNode.prevLeaf { !it.isWhiteSpace() }!!
 547→        } else {
 548→            startIndentContext(
 549→                fromAstNode = node,
 550→                toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 551→                childIndent = "",
 552→            )
 553→        }
 554→    }
 555→
 556→    private fun visitFun(node: ASTNode) {
 557→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 558→        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 559→        val eqOrBlock =
 560→            node.findChildByType(EQ)
 561→                ?: node.findChildByType(BLOCK)
 562→        eqOrBlock?.let {
 563→            nextToAstNode =
 564→                startIndentContext(
 565→                    fromAstNode = eqOrBlock,
 566→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 567→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 568→        }
 569→
 570→        node
 571→            .findChildByType(TYPE_REFERENCE)
 572→            ?.let { typeReference ->
 573→                nextToAstNode =
 574→                    startIndentContext(
 575→                        fromAstNode = typeReference.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 576→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 577→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 578→            }
 579→
 580→        // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as function itself
 581→        startIndentContext(
 582→            fromAstNode = node,
 583→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 584→            childIndent = "",
 585→        )
 586→    }
 587→
 588→    private fun visitClass(node: ASTNode) {
 589→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 590→        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 591→        node
 592→            .findChildByType(CLASS_BODY)
 593→            ?.let { classBody ->
 594→                nextToAstNode =
 595→                    classBody
 596→                        .getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces()
 597→                        .prevLeaf()
 598→                        ?: node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 599→            }
 600→
 601→        node
 602→            .findChildByType(WHERE_KEYWORD)
 603→            ?.let { where ->
 604→                val typeConstraintList =
 605→                    requireNotNull(
 606→                        where.nextCodeSibling(),
 607→                    ) { "Can not find code sibling after WHERE in CLASS" }
 608→                require(
 609→                    typeConstraintList.elementType == TYPE_CONSTRAINT_LIST,
 610→                ) { "Code sibling after WHERE in CLASS is not a TYPE_CONSTRAINT_LIST" }
 611→                nextToAstNode =
 612→                    startIndentContext(
 613→                        fromAstNode = where.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 614→                        toAstNode = typeConstraintList.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 615→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 616→            }
 617→
 618→        val primaryConstructor = node.findChildByType(PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR)
 619→        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official && primaryConstructor != null) {
 620→            val superTypeList = node.findChildByType(SUPER_TYPE_LIST)
 621→            val constructorContextEndNode = nextToAstNode
 622→
 623→            if (superTypeList != null && primaryConstructor.findChildByType(CONSTRUCTOR_KEYWORD) != null) {
 624→                val parentIndent = currentIndent()
 625→                nextToAstNode =
 626→                    startIndentContext(
 627→                        fromAstNode = superTypeList.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 628→                        toAstNode = constructorContextEndNode,
 629→                        nodeIndent = parentIndent + indentConfig.indent,
 630→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 631→
 632→                nextToAstNode =
 633→                    startIndentContext(
 634→                        fromAstNode = primaryConstructor.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 635→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 636→                        nodeIndent = parentIndent,
 637→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 638→            } else {
 639→                // Indent both constructor and super type list
 640→                nextToAstNode =
 641→                    startIndentContext(
 642→                        fromAstNode = primaryConstructor.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 643→                        toAstNode = constructorContextEndNode,
 644→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 645→            }
 646→        } else {
 647→            node
 648→                .findChildByType(SUPER_TYPE_LIST)
 649→                ?.let { superTypeList ->
 650→                    nextToAstNode =
 651→                        startIndentContext(
 652→                            fromAstNode = superTypeList.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 653→                            toAstNode = superTypeList.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 654→                        ).prevCodeLeaf()
 655→                }
 656→        }
 657→
 658→        // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as class itself
 659→        startIndentContext(
 660→            fromAstNode = node,
 661→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 662→            childIndent = "",
 663→        )
 664→    }
 665→
 666→    private fun visitObjectDeclaration(node: ASTNode) {
 667→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 668→        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 669→        node
 670→            .findChildByType(SUPER_TYPE_LIST)
 671→            ?.let { superTypeList ->
 672→                nextToAstNode =
 673→                    startIndentContext(
 674→                        fromAstNode = superTypeList.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 675→                        toAstNode = superTypeList.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 676→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 677→            }
 678→
 679→        // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as class itself
 680→        startIndentContext(
 681→            fromAstNode = node,
 682→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 683→            childIndent = "",
 684→        )
 685→    }
 686→
 687→    private fun visitBinaryExpression(node: ASTNode) {
 688→        if (isPartOfBinaryExpressionWrappedInCondition(node)) {
 689→            // Complex binary expression are nested in such a way that the indent context of the condition
 690→            // wrapper is not the last node on the stack
 691→            val conditionIndentContext =
 692→                indentContextStack.last { it.fromASTNode.elementType != BINARY_EXPRESSION }
 693→            // Create new indent context for the remainder (operator and right-hand side) of the binary expression
 694→            startIndentContext(
 695→                fromAstNode = node.findChildByType(OPERATION_REFERENCE)!!,
 696→                toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 697→                nodeIndent = conditionIndentContext.nodeIndent,
 698→                childIndent = conditionIndentContext.childIndent,
 699→            )
 700→            startIndentContext(node.firstChildNode)
 701→        } else if (node.treeParent?.elementType != BINARY_EXPRESSION ||
 702→            node.findChildByType(OPERATION_REFERENCE)?.firstChildNode?.elementType == ELVIS
 703→        ) {
 704→            startIndentContext(node)
 705→        }
 706→    }
 707→
 708→    private fun visitIdentifierInProperty(node: ASTNode) {
 709→        startIndentContext(
 710→            fromAstNode = node,
 711→            toAstNode = node.treeParent.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 712→        )
 713→    }
 714→
 715→    private fun visitWhen(node: ASTNode) {
 716→        var nextToASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 717→        node
 718→            .findChildByType(LPAR)
 719→            ?.let { lpar ->
 720→                nextToASTNode =
 721→                    startIndentContext(
 722→                        fromAstNode = lpar,
 723→                        toAstNode = node.findChildByType(RPAR)!!,
 724→                        lastChildIndent = "",
 725→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 726→            }
 727→        startIndentContext(
 728→            fromAstNode = node,
 729→            toAstNode = nextToASTNode,
 730→        )
 731→    }
 732→
 733→    private fun visitWhenEntry(node: ASTNode) {
 734→        node
 735→            .findChildByType(ARROW)
 736→            ?.let { arrow ->
 737→                val outerIndent =
 738→                    if (arrow.nextLeaf()?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 739→                        ""
 740→                    } else {
 741→                        indentConfig.indent
 742→                    }
 743→                startIndentContext(
 744→                    fromAstNode = arrow.nextLeaf()!!,
 745→                    toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 746→                    firstChildIndent = outerIndent,
 747→                    lastChildIndent = outerIndent,
 748→                )
 749→                startIndentContext(
 750→                    fromAstNode = node,
 751→                    toAstNode = arrow,
 752→                    childIndent = "",
 753→                )
 754→            }
 755→    }
 756→
 757→    private fun visitWhereKeywordBeforeTypeConstraintList(node: ASTNode) {
 758→        startIndentContext(
 759→            fromAstNode = node,
 760→            toAstNode = node.nextCodeSibling()?.lastChildLeafOrSelf()!!,
 761→            childIndent = TYPE_CONSTRAINT_CONTINUATION_INDENT,
 762→        )
 763→    }
 764→
 765→    private fun visitKdoc(node: ASTNode) {
 766→        node
 767→            .findChildByType(KDOC_START)
 768→            ?.nextLeaf()
 769→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 770→                startIndentContext(
 771→                    fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 772→                    toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 773→                    childIndent = KDOC_CONTINUATION_INDENT,
 774→                )
 775→            }
 776→    }

 778→    private fun visitPropertyAccessor(node: ASTNode) {
 779→        var nextToASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 780→        node
 781→            .findChildByType(EQ)
 782→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 783→                nextToASTNode =
 784→                    startIndentContext(
 785→                        fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 786→                        toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 787→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 788→            }
 789→        // No indent on preceding annotations and comments
 790→        startIndentContext(
 791→            fromAstNode = node,
 792→            toAstNode = nextToASTNode,
 793→            childIndent = "",
 794→        )
 795→    }

 797→    private fun visitConditionalLoop(node: ASTNode) {
 798→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 799→        node
 800→            .findChildByType(BODY)
 801→            ?.takeIf { it.nextCodeLeaf()?.elementType != LBRACE }
 802→            ?.let { rpar ->
 803→                startIndentContext(
 804→                    fromAstNode = rpar,
 805→                    toAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 806→                )
 807→            }
 808→        node
 809→            .findChildByType(CONDITION)
 810→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 811→                startIndentContext(fromAstNode)
 812→            }
 813→    }

 815→    private fun visitLBracket(node: ASTNode) {

 818→            .takeUnless {
 819→                // Should be resolved in IntelliJ IDEA default formatter:
 820→                // https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KTIJ-14859/Too-little-indentation-inside-the-brackets-in-multiple-annotations-with-the-same-target
 821→                it.elementType == ANNOTATION

 823→            ?.let { rbracket ->

 826→                    toAstNode = rbracket,

 855→        node
 856→            .findChildByType(EQ)

 860→                        fromAstNode = eq,

 865→        node

 876→    private fun visitTryCatchFinally(node: ASTNode) {

 880→            .findChildByType(FINALLY)

 908→    private fun ASTNode.skipLeadingWhitespaceCommentsAndAnnotations(): ASTNode {
 909→        require(elementType == SECONDARY_CONSTRUCTOR || elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER)
 910→        return findChildByType(MODIFIER_LIST)
 911→            ?.let { modifierList ->
 912→                modifierList
 913→                    .children()
 914→                    .firstOrNull { !it.isWhiteSpace() && !it.isPartOfComment() && it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
 915→                    ?: modifierList.nextCodeSibling()
 916→            }
 917→            ?: children().firstOrNull { !it.isWhiteSpace() && !it.isPartOfComment() }
 918→            ?: this
 919→    }

 921→    private fun ASTNode.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(): ASTNode {
 922→        var fromAstNode: ASTNode? = this
 923→        while (fromAstNode?.prevLeaf() != null &&
 924→            (fromAstNode.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpace() || fromAstNode.prevLeaf()?.isPartOfComment() == true)
 925→        ) {
 926→            fromAstNode = fromAstNode.prevLeaf()
 927→        }
 928→        return fromAstNode!!
 929→    }

 931→    private fun isPartOfBinaryExpressionWrappedInCondition(node: ASTNode) =
 932→        node
 933→            .parents()
 934→            .takeWhile { it.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION || it.elementType == CONDITION }
 935→            .lastOrNull()
 936→            ?.elementType == CONDITION

 938→    private fun currentIndent() =
 939→        indentContextStack
 940→            .peekLast()
 941→            .indent()
 942→
 943→    private fun startIndentContext(
 944→        fromAstNode: ASTNode,
 945→        toAstNode: ASTNode = fromAstNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 946→        nodeIndent: String = currentIndent(),
 947→        childIndent: String = indentConfig.indent,
 948→        firstChildIndent: String = childIndent,
 949→        lastChildIndent: String = childIndent,
 950→    ): IndentContext =
 951→        IndentContext(
 952→            fromASTNode = fromAstNode,
 953→            toASTNode = toAstNode,
 954→            nodeIndent = nodeIndent,
 955→            firstChildIndent = firstChildIndent,
 956→            childIndent = childIndent,
 957→            lastChildIndent = lastChildIndent,
 958→        ).also { newIndentContext ->
 959→            LOGGER.trace {
 960→                val nodeIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(newIndentContext.nodeIndent)
 961→                val childIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(newIndentContext.childIndent)
 962→                "Create new indent context (same as parent) with level ($nodeIndentLevel, $childIndentLevel) for " +
 963→                    "${fromAstNode.elementType}: ${newIndentContext.nodes}"
 964→            }
 965→            indentContextStack.addLast(newIndentContext)
 966→        }
 967→
 968→    override fun afterVisitChildNodes(
 969→        node: ASTNode,
 970→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 971→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 972→    ) {
 973→        while (indentContextStack.peekLast()?.toASTNode == node) {
 974→            LOGGER.trace {
 975→                val indentContext = indentContextStack.peekLast()
 976→                val nodeIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.nodeIndent)
 977→                val childIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.childIndent)
 978→                "Remove indent context with level ($nodeIndentLevel, $childIndentLevel) for ${indentContext.fromASTNode.elementType}: " +
 979→                    "${indentContext.nodes}"
 980→            }
 981→            indentContextStack
 982→                .removeLast()
 983→                .also {
 984→                    LOGGER.trace {
 985→                        val indentContext = indentContextStack.peekLast()
 986→                        val nodeIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.nodeIndent)
 987→                        val childIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.childIndent)
 988→                        "Last indent context with level ($nodeIndentLevel, $childIndentLevel) for " +
 989→                            "${indentContext.fromASTNode.elementType}: ${indentContext.nodes}"
 990→                    }
 991→                }
 992→        }
 993→    }
 994→
 995→    override fun afterLastNode() {
 996→        require(indentContextStack.isEmpty()) {
 997→            indentContextStack
 998→                .joinToString(prefix = "Stack should be empty:\n\t", separator = "\n\t") { it.toString() }
 999→        }
1000→    }

1002→    private fun visitNewLineIndentation(
1003→        node: ASTNode,
1004→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
1005→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
1006→    ) {
1007→        if (node.ignoreIndent()) {
1008→            return
1009→        }
1010→
1011→        val normalizedNodeIndent = node.normalizedIndent(emit)
1012→        val expectedIndentation = node.expectedIndent()
1013→        val text = node.text
1014→        val nodeIndent = text.substringAfterLast("\n")
1015→        if (nodeIndent != normalizedNodeIndent || normalizedNodeIndent != expectedIndentation) {
1016→            if (normalizedNodeIndent != expectedIndentation) {
1017→                emit(
1018→                    node.startOffset + text.length - nodeIndent.length,
1019→                    "Unexpected indentation (${normalizedNodeIndent.length}) (should be ${expectedIndentation.length})",
1020→                    true,
1021→                )
1022→            } else {
1023→                // Indentation was at correct level but contained invalid indent characters. This violation has already
1024→                // been emitted.
1025→            }
1026→            LOGGER.trace {
1027→                "Line $line: " + (if (!autoCorrect) "would have " else "") + "changed indentation to ${expectedIndentation.length} " +
1028→                    "(from ${normalizedNodeIndent.length}) for ${node.elementType}: ${node.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()}"
1029→            }
1030→            if (autoCorrect) {
1031→                (node as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(
1032→                    text.substringBeforeLast("\n") + "\n" + expectedIndentation,
1033→                )
1034→            }
1035→        } else {
1036→            node.processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
1037→        }
1038→    }
1039→
1040→    private fun ASTNode.ignoreIndent(): Boolean {
1041→        val nextLeaf = nextLeaf()
1042→        if (text.endsWith("\n") && nextLeaf.isStartOfRawStringLiteral()) {
1043→            processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
1044→            return true // raw strings (""") are allowed at column 0
1045→        }
1046→
1047→        nextLeaf
1048→            ?.parent(strict = false) { it.psi is PsiComment }
1049→            ?.let { comment ->
1050→                if (text.endsWith("\n")) {
1051→                    processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
1052→                    return true // comments are allowed at column 0
1053→                }
1054→                if (comment.textContains('\n') && comment.elementType == BLOCK_COMMENT) {
1055→                    // FIXME: while we cannot assume any kind of layout inside a block comment,
1056→                    // `/*` and `*/` can still be indented
1057→                    processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
1058→                    return true
1059→                }
1060→            }
1061→        return false
1062→    }
1063→
1064→    private fun ASTNode?.isStartOfRawStringLiteral(): Boolean = this != null && this.elementType == OPEN_QUOTE && this.text == "\"\"\""
1065→
1066→    private fun ASTNode.processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded() =
1067→        LOGGER.trace { "No indentation change required for $elementType: ${textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()}" }
1068→
1069→    private fun ASTNode.expectedIndent(): String {
1070→        val lastIndexContext = indentContextStack.peekLast()
1071→        val nextLeaf = nextLeaf()
1072→        val adjustedChildIndent =
1073→            when {
1074→                this == lastIndexContext.fromASTNode.firstChildLeafOrSelf() ||
1075→                    nextLeaf == lastIndexContext.fromASTNode.firstChildLeafOrSelf() ->
1076→                    lastIndexContext.firstChildIndent
1077→
1078→                this == lastIndexContext.toASTNode ||
1079→                    nextLeaf == lastIndexContext.toASTNode ->
1080→                    lastIndexContext.lastChildIndent
1081→
1082→                else -> lastIndexContext.childIndent
1083→            }
1084→        return lastIndexContext.nodeIndent + adjustedChildIndent
1085→    }
1086→
1087→    private fun ASTNode.normalizedIndent(emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit): String {
1088→        val nodeIndent = text.substringAfterLast("\n")
1089→        return when (indentConfig.indentStyle) {
1090→            SPACE -> {
1091→                if ('\t' in nodeIndent) {
1092→                    emit(
1093→                        startOffset + text.length - nodeIndent.length,
1094→                        "Unexpected tab character(s)",
1095→                        true,
1096→                    )
1097→                    indentConfig.toNormalizedIndent(nodeIndent)
1098→                } else {
1099→                    nodeIndent
1100→                }
1101→            }
1102→
1103→            TAB -> {
1104→                val acceptableTrailingSpaces = acceptableTrailingSpaces()
1105→                val nodeIndentWithoutAcceptableTrailingSpaces = nodeIndent.removeSuffix(acceptableTrailingSpaces)
1106→                if (' ' in nodeIndentWithoutAcceptableTrailingSpaces) {
1107→                    emit(
1108→                        startOffset + text.length - nodeIndent.length,
1109→                        "Unexpected space character(s)",
1110→                        true,
1111→                    )
1112→                    indentConfig
1113→                        .toNormalizedIndent(nodeIndentWithoutAcceptableTrailingSpaces)
1114→                        .plus(acceptableTrailingSpaces)
1115→                } else {
1116→                    nodeIndent
1117→                }
1118→            }
1119→        }
1120→    }
1121→
1122→    private fun visitWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingQuote(
1123→        node: ASTNode,
1124→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
1125→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
1126→    ) {
1127→        if (!this::stringTemplateIndenter.isInitialized) {
1128→            stringTemplateIndenter = StringTemplateIndenter(codeStyle, indentConfig)
1129→        }
1130→        stringTemplateIndenter.visitClosingQuotes(currentIndent(), node.treeParent, autoCorrect, emit)
1131→    }
1132→
1133→    private fun ASTNode?.isElvisOperator() =
1134→        this != null &&
1135→            elementType == OPERATION_REFERENCE &&
1136→            firstChildNode?.elementType == ELVIS
1137→
1138→    private fun ASTNode.acceptableTrailingSpaces(): String {
1139→        require(elementType == WHITE_SPACE)
1140→        val acceptableTrailingSpaces =
1141→            when (nextLeaf()?.elementType) {
1142→                KDOC_LEADING_ASTERISK, KDOC_END -> {
1143→                    // The indentation of a KDoc comment contains a space as the last character regardless of the indentation
1144→                    // style (tabs or spaces) except for the starting line of the KDoc comment
1145→                    KDOC_CONTINUATION_INDENT
1146→                }
1147→
1148→                TYPE_CONSTRAINT -> {
1149→                    // 6 spaces (length of "where" keyword plus a separator space) to indent type constraints as below:
1150→                    //    where A1 : RecyclerView.Adapter<V1>,
1151→                    //               A1 : ComposableAdapter.ViewTypeProvider,
1152→                    TYPE_CONSTRAINT_CONTINUATION_INDENT
1153→                }
1154→
1155→                else -> ""
1156→            }
1157→        val nodeIndent = text.substringAfterLast("\n")
1158→        return if (nodeIndent.endsWith(acceptableTrailingSpaces)) {
1159→            return acceptableTrailingSpaces
1160→        } else {
1161→            ""
1162→        }
1163→    }
1164→
1165→    private fun startNoIndentZone(node: ASTNode) =
1166→        IndentContext(
1167→            fromASTNode = node,
1168→            nodeIndent = "",
1169→            firstChildIndent = "",
1170→            childIndent = "",
1171→            lastChildIndent = "",
1172→            activated = true,
1173→        )
1174→
1175→    private companion object {
1176→        const val KDOC_CONTINUATION_INDENT = " "
1177→        const val TYPE_CONSTRAINT_CONTINUATION_INDENT = "      " // Length of keyword "where" plus separating space
1178→        val CHAINABLE_EXPRESSION = setOf(DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION, SAFE_ACCESS_EXPRESSION)
1179→    }
1180→
1181→    private data class IndentContext(
1182→        /**
1183→         * The node on which the indent context starts.
1184→         */
1185→        val fromASTNode: ASTNode,
1186→        /**
1187→         * The node at which the indent context ends. If null, then the context ends at the last child leaf of the node
1188→         * on which the indent context starts.
1189→         */
1190→        val toASTNode: ASTNode = fromASTNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
1191→        /**
1192→         * Cumulative indentation for the node. Normally this should be equal to a multiple of the
1193→         * 'indentConfig.indentStyle' to ensure a consistent indentation style.
1194→         */
1195→        val nodeIndent: String,
1196→        /**
1197→         * Additional indentation for first child node. Normally this should be equal to the 'indentConfig.indent' to
1198→         * ensure a consistent indentation style. In very limited cases when the default indentation is set to 'tab' it
1199→         * is still needed to adjust the last indentation using spaces.
1200→         */
1201→        val firstChildIndent: String,
1202→        /**
1203→         * Additional indentation for child nodes. Normally this should be equal to the 'indentConfig.indent' to ensure
1204→         * a consistent indentation style. In very limited cases when the default indentation is set to 'tab' it is
1205→         * still needed to adjust the last indentation using spaces.
1206→         */
1207→        val childIndent: String,
1208→        /**
1209→         * Additional indentation for last child node. Normally this should be equal to the 'indentConfig.indent' to
1210→         * ensure a consistent indentation style. In very limited cases when the default indentation is set to 'tab' it
1211→         * is still needed to adjust the last indentation using spaces.
1212→         */
1213→        val lastChildIndent: String,
1214→        /**
1215→         * True when the indentation level of this context is activated
1216→         */
1217→        val activated: Boolean = false,
1218→    ) {
1219→        val nodes: String
1220→            get() =
1221→                fromASTNode
1222→                    .prevLeaf() // The 'fromAstNode' itself needs to be returned by '.leaves()' call as well
1223→                    ?.leaves()
1224→                    .orEmpty()
1225→                    .takeWhile {
1226→                        // The 'toAstNode' itself needs to be included as well
1227→                        it != toASTNode.nextLeaf()
1228→                    }
1229→                    .joinToString(separator = "") { it.text }
1230→                    .textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()
1231→
1232→        fun indent() =
1233→            if (activated) {
1234→                nodeIndent + childIndent
1235→            } else {
1236→                nodeIndent
1237→            }
1238→
1239→        fun prevCodeLeaf() = fromASTNode.prevCodeLeaf()!!
1240→    }
1241→}
1242→
1243→private fun ASTNode.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline() = text.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()
1244→
1245→private fun String.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline(): String {
1246→    val (prefix, suffix) =
1247→        if (this.all { it.isWhitespace() }) {
1248→            Pair("[", "]")
1249→        } else {
1250→            Pair("", "")
1251→        }
1252→    return prefix
1253→        .plus(
1254→            this
1255→                .replace("\t", "\\t")
1256→                .replace("\n", "\\n"),
1257→        ).plus(suffix)
1258→}
1259→
1260→private class StringTemplateIndenter(
1261→    private val codeStyle: CodeStyleValue,
1262→    private val indentConfig: IndentConfig,
1263→) {
1264→    fun visitClosingQuotes(
1265→        expectedIndent: String,
1266→        node: ASTNode,
1267→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
1268→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
1269→    ) {
1270→        require(node.elementType == STRING_TEMPLATE)
1271→        node
1272→            .let { it.psi as KtStringTemplateExpression }
1273→            .takeIf { it.isFollowedByTrimIndent() || it.isFollowedByTrimMargin() }
1274→            ?.takeIf { it.isMultiLine() }
1275→            ?.let { _ ->
1276→                if (node.containsMixedIndentationCharacters()) {
1277→                    // It can not be determined with certainty how mixed indentation characters should be interpreted.
1278→                    // The trimIndent function handles tabs and spaces equally (one tabs equals one space) while the user
1279→                    // might expect that the tab size in the indentation is more than one space.
1280→                    emit(
1281→                        node.startOffset,
1282→                        "Indentation of multiline string should not contain both tab(s) and space(s)",
1283→                        false,
1284→                    )
1285→                    return
1286→                }
1287→
1288→                val prefixLength = node.getCommonPrefixLength()
1289→                val prevLeaf = node.prevLeaf()
1290→                val correctedExpectedIndent =
1291→                    if (codeStyle == ktlint_official && node.isRawStringLiteralReturnInFunctionBodyBlock()) {
1292→                        // Allow:
1293→                        //   fun foo(): String {
1294→                        //       return """
1295→                        //           some text
1296→                        //           """.trimIndent
1297→                        //   }
1298→                        node
1299→                            .indent(false)
1300→                            .plus(indentConfig.indent)
1301→                    } else if (codeStyle == ktlint_official && node.isRawStringLiteralFunctionBodyExpression()) {
1302→                        // Allow:
1303→                        //   fun foo(
1304→                        //       bar: String
1305→                        //   ) = """
1306→                        //       $bar
1307→                        //       """.trimIndent
1308→                        node
1309→                            .indent(false)
1310→                            .plus(indentConfig.indent)
1311→                    } else if (prevLeaf?.text == "\n") {
1312→                        // In case the opening quotes are placed at the start of the line, then the closing quotes
1313→                        // should have no indent as well.
1314→                        ""
1315→                    } else {
1316→                        expectedIndent
1317→                    }
1318→                node.children()
1319→                    .forEach {
1320→                        if (it.prevLeaf()?.text == "\n" &&
1321→                            (
1322→                                it.isLiteralStringTemplateEntry() ||
1323→                                    it.isVariableStringTemplateEntry() ||
1324→                                    it.isClosingQuote()
1325→                                )
1326→                        ) {
1327→                            val (actualIndent, actualContent) =
1328→                                if (it.isIndentBeforeClosingQuote()) {
1329→                                    it.text.splitIndentAt(it.text.length)
1330→                                } else if (it.isVariableStringTemplateEntry() && it.isFirstNonBlankElementOnLine()) {
1331→                                    it.getFirstElementOnSameLine().text.splitIndentAt(correctedExpectedIndent.length)
1332→                                } else {
1333→                                    it.text.splitIndentAt(prefixLength)
1334→                                }
1335→                            if (indentConfig.containsUnexpectedIndentChar(actualIndent)) {
1336→                                val offsetFirstWrongIndentChar =
1337→                                    indentConfig.indexOfFirstUnexpectedIndentChar(actualIndent)
1338→                                emit(
1339→                                    it.startOffset + offsetFirstWrongIndentChar,
1340→                                    "Unexpected '${indentConfig.unexpectedIndentCharDescription}' character(s) in margin of multiline " +
1341→                                        "string",
1342→                                    true,
1343→                                )
1344→                                if (autoCorrect) {
1345→                                    (it.firstChildNode as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(
1346→                                        correctedExpectedIndent + actualContent,
1347→                                    )
1348→                                }
1349→                            } else if (actualIndent != correctedExpectedIndent && it.isIndentBeforeClosingQuote()) {
1350→                                // It is a deliberate choice not to fix the indents inside the string literal except the line which only contains
1351→                                // the closing quotes.
1352→                                emit(
1353→                                    it.startOffset,
1354→                                    "Unexpected indent of multiline string closing quotes",
1355→                                    true,
1356→                                )
1357→                                if (autoCorrect) {
1358→                                    if (it.firstChildNode == null) {
1359→                                        (it as LeafPsiElement).rawInsertBeforeMe(
1360→                                            LeafPsiElement(REGULAR_STRING_PART, correctedExpectedIndent),
1361→                                        )
1362→                                    } else {
1363→                                        (it.firstChildNode as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(
1364→                                            correctedExpectedIndent + actualContent,
1365→                                        )
1366→                                    }
1367→                                }
1368→                            }
1369→                        }
1370→                    }

1384→    /**

1386→     * the closing quotes.
1387→     */
1388→    private fun ASTNode.getCommonPrefixLength() =
1389→        children()
1390→            .filterNot { it.elementType == OPEN_QUOTE }
1391→            .filterNot { it.elementType == CLOSING_QUOTE }
1392→            .filter { it.prevLeaf()?.text == "\n" }
1393→            .filterNot { it.text == "\n" }
1394→            .let { indents ->
1395→                val indentsExceptBlankIndentBeforeClosingQuote =
1396→                    indents
1397→                        .filterNot { it.isIndentBeforeClosingQuote() }
1398→                if (indentsExceptBlankIndentBeforeClosingQuote.count() > 0) {
1399→                    indentsExceptBlankIndentBeforeClosingQuote
1400→                } else {
1401→                    indents
1402→                }
1403→            }
1404→            .map { it.text.indentLength() }
1405→            .minOrNull()
1406→            ?: 0

1416→    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isMultiLine(): Boolean {
1417→        for (child in node.children()) {
1418→            if (child.elementType == LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY) {
1419→                val v = child.text
1420→                if (v == "\n") {
1421→                    return true
1422→                }
1423→            }
1424→        }
1425→        return false

1428→    private fun ASTNode.containsMixedIndentationCharacters(): Boolean {
1429→        assert((this.psi as KtStringTemplateExpression).isMultiLine())
1430→        val nonBlankLines =
1431→            this
1432→                .text
1433→                .split("\n")
1434→                .filterNot { it.startsWith("\"\"\"") }
1435→                .filterNot { it.endsWith("\"\"\"") }
1436→                .filterNot { it.isBlank() }
1437→        val prefixLength = nonBlankLines.minOfOrNull { it.indentLength() } ?: 0
1438→        val distinctIndentCharacters =
1439→            nonBlankLines
1440→                .joinToString(separator = "") {
1441→                    it.splitIndentAt(prefixLength).first
1442→                }
1443→                .toCharArray()
1444→                .distinct()
1445→                .count()
1446→        return distinctIndentCharacters > 1
1447→    }

1450→        elementType == CLOSING_QUOTE || (text.isBlank() && nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == CLOSING_QUOTE)

1461→    /**
1462→     * Splits the string at the given index or at the first non-white space character before that index. The returned pair
1463→     * consists of the indentation and the second part contains the remainder. Note that the second part still can start
1464→     * with whitespace characters in case the original strings starts with more white space characters than the requested
1465→     * split index.
1466→     */
1467→    private fun String.splitIndentAt(index: Int): Pair<String, String> {
1468→        assert(index >= 0)
1469→        val firstNonWhitespaceIndex =
1470→            indexOfFirst { !it.isWhitespace() }.let {
1471→                if (it == -1) {
1472→                    this.length
1473→                } else {
1474→                    it
1475→                }
1476→            }
1477→        val safeIndex = kotlin.math.min(firstNonWhitespaceIndex, index)
1478→        return Pair(
1479→            first = this.take(safeIndex),
1480→            second = this.substring(safeIndex),
1481→        )
1482→    }

1484→    private fun ASTNode.getFirstElementOnSameLine(): ASTNode {
1485→        val firstLeafOnLine = prevLeaf { it.text == "\n" }
1486→        return if (firstLeafOnLine == null) {
1487→            this
1488→        } else {
1489→            firstLeafOnLine.nextLeaf(includeEmpty = true) ?: this
1490→        }
1491→    }
1492→
1493→    private fun ASTNode.isFirstNonBlankElementOnLine(): Boolean {
1494→        var node: ASTNode? = getFirstElementOnSameLine()
1495→        while (node != null && node != this && node.text.isWhitespace()) {
1496→            node = node.nextLeaf()
1497→        }
1498→        return node != this
1499→    }
